title: Make the PQR a Tool, Not a Chore
alt: Five practical steps to run an effective product quality review

items.label: Define period & deadline
items.desc: Set the reporting window and firm completion date in an SOP.

items.label: Collect data all year
items.desc: Gather continuously so trends are visible while there is time to act.

items.label: Write a signed conclusion
items.desc: State whether the process stays validated and in a state of control.

items.label: Cross-reference, don't duplicate
items.desc: Pull from deviation, change and stability systems, not re-litigate.

items.label: Carry forward open actions
items.desc: Roll unresolved actions into the next review so none are dropped.
